description: Finish the orchestrator GUI so the core dashboard, controls, drilldowns, exports, and readiness tracking are fully repo-backed before orchestrating new downstream repos.
Build a coding eval harness that compares candidate 24B checkpoints against frontier GPT baselines on repo-defined coding tasks with reproducible scoring artifacts.
Create the data ingestion and formatting pipeline needed to turn traces, repos, and lessons into training-ready coding datasets for the 24B model effort.
Stand up the real training stack for the 24B coding model including config, launch, checkpoint, and evaluation integration.
Build the managed child-repo scaffold so the orchestrator can create and operate independent repos with their own SPAWN runtime contract, but only after the orchestrator GUI is fully repo-backed.
Implement dispatch, log collection, and handoff flows for independent repos so the orchestrator can coordinate real downstream work, but only after the orchestrator GUI is fully repo-backed.
Harden task-scoped locks, allowed_paths enforcement, audit trails, and stray-write handling across independent repos and GUI controls.
